title: Launch Air Strikes
description: Lets You Launch Air Strikes Anywhere You Want.
body:
- **Lets You Launch Air Strikes Anywhere You Want.**
- **Recipe: One Five Redstone Dust, Three Stone Blocks, One Stone Button.**

**To Use The Remote Just Right Click With It.**
**Have Fun With This Simple DataPack :)**

- **Trigger Commands:**
- /trigger launch_air_strike
- /trigger cancel_air_strike
